title: WIDE ANGLE | Raghu Rai: What I Learnt While He Raised News Photos To The World Of Art |Saeed Naqvi
description: In his persona two professionals coexisted: a newspaper photographer with a keen eye and an artist who had pitched it as high as Cartier-Bresson, possibly the world’s greatest photographer in his day. It was Raghu’s determination that Bresson, at the peak of his reputation, would spot in Raghu the genius which brought the two together. Raghu valued immeasurably the many compliments Bresson paid him
